meta.title: LM Weddyli — Luxury Bridal by Linda Monga
meta.description: LM Weddyli — luxury bridal atelier by Linda Monga. Designed in Lubumbashi, produced in Istanbul.

hero.headline: Where Your Dress Becomes Your Story
hero.subline: Made-to-measure bridal, designed in Lubumbashi and hand-crafted in our Istanbul atelier.

atelier.headline: Every Gown Begins With A Conversation
atelier.body: LM Weddyli is a made-to-measure bridal atelier founded by Linda Monga. Each gown is designed in Lubumbashi and hand-constructed in our Istanbul workshop — fitted to you alone, and sent wherever you call home.

process.headline: From Conversation To Gown, Five Steps

begin.headline: Ready To Begin Your Story?
begin.body: A free consultation is the first step. No pressure, no obligation — just a conversation about the dress only you could wear.

meta.title: Collections — LM Weddyli
meta.description: Twelve made-to-measure silhouettes across two collections — Lumière and Harmattan.

hero.headline: Where Light Meets Structure
hero.subline: Two collections, twelve silhouettes — Lumière and Harmattan, each gown made to your measurements alone.

hero.headline: From first conversation to final stitch.

measurementGuide.headline: Eight Measurements, Taken At Home
measurementGuide.body: No showroom visit required. A written guide and a video call with Linda walk you through each of these, step by step.

meta.title: About Linda Monga — LM Weddyli

begin.headline: Let’s Design Your Story
begin.body: Whether you’re ready to begin or simply want to see the collection first, Linda would love to hear from you.
